changelog:
## Initial Release
- Core GUI with Adw.NavigationSplitView
- Drop Zone: drag-and-drop file injection
- AppID Loader: generate ACF manifests
- Supported Library: browse database games with header images
- Steam Sync: fetch owned games via Vanity URL/SteamID64
- Quick Access: one-click manifest generation
- Auto-update engine with AdwBanner
- Updates tab with changelog display
- Multi-distro setup.sh (Fedora/Debian/openSUSE/Arch)
- install.sh for local development
- Subnautica 2 support (1962700, 50GB, StateFlags 1026)
